changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "group" ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, "name" VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(512), is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) ); COMMENT ON TABLE "group" IS 'User groups for access control';
